analysis: The project appears to be a web-based interactive educational site about black holes. The current theme needs to be enhanced with cosmic visuals, animated elements, and a dark background to reflect the black hole topic. The site should include animated slides, interactive objects, and a bulk animated page to create an immersive experience.

improvements.description: Update the CSS to include a dark cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add CSS variables for cosmic colors and animations.
Enhance the HTML to include a bulk animated page with sections for black hole information, interactive planets, and animated slides. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.

Complete the JavaScript to implement the bulk animated page functionality, including animations for black hole visuals, interactive elements, and smooth transitions. Ensure all event listeners and functionality for new buttons are properly implemented.
